name: Starting Block
task: Step outside and photograph the nearest 'Orange St' street sign with your backpack in the frame. (This is your test shot — confirm camera + verification work before you head out.)
verifyHint: image must show an Orange Street sign with a backpack visible in the frame
rewardLabel: Take a swig from the bag — the warm-up sip.

name: Firehouse 12
task: Photo of the Firehouse 12 façade — the old apparatus-bay doors, the 'Firehouse 12' signage, or any clearly identifying angle of the building.
verifyHint: image must show the façade of Firehouse 12 at 45 Crown St — a former early-1900s firehouse converted to a bar/recording studio. Accept any clearly-identifying view: the apparatus-bay doors (any color), the 'Firehouse 12' signage, the brick façade with the firehouse-style architecture, or the entrance. Do NOT require any specific color or angle.

name: The Elihu Club
task: Photo of the white clapboard Elihu Club house facing the New Haven Green.
verifyHint: image must show a white wood-frame colonial-style house on the New Haven Green
rewardLabel: AI tells you about the Regicides hidden nearby.

name: Ordinary
task: Photo of the 'Oldest Tavern Site' plaque near the door of Ordinary.
verifyHint: image must show a historical bronze plaque near the entrance of Ordinary tavern

name: Wooster Square
address: Wooster Square Park, New Haven, CT
task: Photo of the cherry trees, the Christopher Columbus statue, or the Frank Pepe's neon sign on Wooster St.
verifyHint: image must show one of: (a) the cherry trees / open green of Wooster Square Park, (b) the Christopher Columbus statue at the center of the square, or (c) the Frank Pepe's Pizzeria neon sign at 157 Wooster St
rewardLabel: A century of Italian-immigrant New Haven, condensed into one block. Toast the cherry trees. Slice optional.
